pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java version property and compiler settings from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent dependency from 2.5.6 to 3.2.0-RC2, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Replace the deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI to support Spring Boot 3.
Update the Maven Enforcer plugin rules to require Java 21 instead of Java 17.
